statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name'); short_dir=$(basename "$current_dir"); cd "$current_dir" 2>/dev/null; git_branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$git_branch" ]; then if git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then git_clean='✓'; else git_clean='✗'; fi; git_info=" on \033[0;35m$git_branch\033[2m $git_clean"; else git_info=''; fi; if [ -n "$VIRTUAL_ENV" ]; then venv_name=$(basename "$VIRTUAL_ENV"); venv_info=" \033[0;33m($venv_name)\033[2m"; else venv_info=''; fi; usage=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.current_usage'); if [ "$usage" != "null" ]; then current=$(echo "$usage" | jq '.input_tokens + .cache_creation_input_tokens + .cache_read_input_tokens'); size=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.context_window_size'); pct=$((current * 100 / size)); context_info=" │ \033[0;36m${pct}%\033[2m ctx"; else context_info=''; fi; printf "\033[2m%s \033[0;36m%s\033[2m%s%s │ %s │ %s%s\033[0m" "$(whoami)" "$short_dir" "$git_info" "$venv_info" "$model" "$style" "$context_info"
